summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Network Analysis System. All backend APIs working (100% success rate), frontend dashboard loads correctly with dark theme and cyan accents, all interactive controls functional, real-time WebSocket updates working, TCP server on port 9000 operational, scenario execution working, and CSV export functional.

Control panel sliders and toggles functional
Real-time charts updating (connections over time, messages/sec)

Port Usage Analysis with unique ports and distribution chart
